_meta.description: Permanent log of Spotify for Artists dashboard snapshots. CSV exports give totals; this captures the WHY — source segmentation, active vs programmed split, saved-playlist replay rate. That segmentation window closes. This file keeps it forever.
_meta.capture_workflow: Spotify for Artists → Streams tab screenshot → Listeners/Sources tab screenshot → hand to Claude for extraction → node brain/snapshot_intake.mjs --track <id> --type <day_N>

field_notes.active_listeners: Direct fans — found track themselves, own playlist saves, artist page. High = real fanbase growth.
field_notes.programmed_listeners: Algorithm/editorial — Radio, Release Radar, Discover Weekly. High = algo working. Should convert to active over time.
field_notes.saved_playlist_spl: Streams-per-listener on saved playlists only. 3.0+ = strong loyalty, 5.0+ = superfan signal.
field_notes.streams_per_listener: Total streams / total listeners. 1.5+ is healthy. 2.0+ indicates replay culture.

snapshots.title: SEE ME
snapshots.notes: Day 28 baseline capture. 4.9x replay on saved playlists = superfan signal. Active/programmed split healthy at 61/37 — algo is working, real fans leading. Low absolute streams expected at Day 28 pre-push. Capture confirmed from Spotify for Artists screenshots Apr 26.
